message:
fix(reconstruct): prevent WAL corruption and harden doctor reconstruction

Switch from WAL to DELETE journal mode using PRAGMA_DB_INIT_BASE_SQL,
preventing corruption when the runtime later opens with different
connection settings. Replace all format!()-based SQL with parameterized
queries (execute_sync with Value types) to eliminate SQL injection risk.
Use last_insert_rowid() instead of MAX(id) for reliable row ID
retrieval. Run the full base migration pipeline and record applied
migrations so the runtime skips re-migration on first open. Add REINDEX
and wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) for clean handoff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
